description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat, multi-tiered roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, with several narrow, vertically oriented windows distributed asymmetrically along the sides. The roof overhangs the walls, creating shaded areas around the perimeter. On one side, there are three large vertical panels or signs adjacent to the building, possibly for decoration or privacy. The main entryway is recessed and features a simple, modern door with a small overhang, and the house lacks ornate detailing, emphasizing clean lines and geometric forms.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat, multi-level roof, light gray walls, and narrow vertical windows, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with four narrow vertical windows and a large overhanging roof, with the entryway partially visible on the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear or side of the house, featuring three large vertical panels or signs and a plain wall with a single door and window.
description_view_2: This view displays the opposite side, with three narrow windows and a large rectangular section of wall, emphasizing the house's geometric form.
description_view_3: This view shows the front of the house, with the main entryway recessed under the roof and two vertical windows on a projecting section.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed modern door with a small overhang, no steps or porch, minimalistic and clean lines
